name: Saba Software, Inc.
description: Saba Software, Inc. is a leading provider of human capital management software and services, offering integrated and customized people management systems to organizations worldwide. Founded in 1997 and headquartered in Dublin, California, the company specializes in talent experience solutions that help businesses manage, develop, and engage their workforce. Saba provides tools for learning, performance management, and succession planning, serving over 1,000 customers across more than 150 countries. Following its acquisition by Cornerstone OnDemand in 2020, Saba continues to be recognized for its contributions to enterprise-level talent management and organizational development technology.
